parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field. Allowed: inventory_total, inventory_available, inventory_allocated, inventory_on_hold, inventory_in_transit, inventory_stock_value, updated_at, sku, product_name, warehouse_name. Prefix with - for descending (default: -inventory_total)

parameters.name: filter[sku]
parameters.description: Filter by partial product SKU match

parameters.name: filter[search]
parameters.description: Search across product SKU and name (partial match)

parameters.name: filter[stock_status]
parameters.description: Filter by computed stock status. Allowed values: in_stock (available > 5), low_stock (available 1-5), out_of_stock (available = 0), incoming (in_transit > 0), allocated (allocated > 0)
